narrative:
Hamilton Twp C (precinct in Warren County) has 1,122 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.1 percentage points.
